message:
fix: revert scanIssueFrom wrapping to preserve sql.ErrNoRows chain (bd-bwk2)

scanIssueFrom must return raw errors because callers check
err == sql.ErrNoRows to convert to storage.ErrNotFound with
entity-specific context. Wrapping at this layer breaks the chain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/opal
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
